title: PE32 1LL, ECD Poultry Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/KP3529LK/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: ECD Poultry Limited Installation name: Station Farm Poultry Unit Permit number: EPR/KP3529LK/A001  "
